data.body: Story 21dd prep complete while plan-reviews for 21dd+36c7 re-run in background (stale on new main). Drafted held-out TDD oracle (tmp/test_store_compat_gate.py full oracle; test_store_compat_happy.py = happy-path subset implementer sees), and implementation brief (tmp/brief_21dd.md) covering compat.py leaf module + gate inside lock.acquire() + _seam/txn/compact/fsck except wiring + fsck_recover + reconcile._apply_mutations explicit gates + store-compat ensure unit + fsck diagnostic surfacing + docs/migrations. Waiting on plan-review attestations to claim 21dd.
